<!-- @generated by usage-cli from usage spec -->
# `pushover`

Send Pushover notifications from the command line


- **Usage**: `pushover [FLAGS] <message>`

## Arguments

### `<message>`

Message content

## Flags

### `-c <callback>`

Callback URL

### `-d <device>`

Target device

### `-D <timestamp>`

Delivery timestamp

### `-e <expire>`

Expiration time in seconds

### `-p <priority>`

Priority level (-2 to 2)

### `-r <retry>`

Retry interval in seconds

### `-t <title>`

Message title

### `-T <token>`

Pushover API token

### `-s <sound>`

Notification sound

### `-u <url>`

URL to include

### `-U <user>`

Pushover user key

### `-a <url_title>`

URL title
